title: NovaMTR Modpack
description: The official modpack for the NovaMTR Minecraft server!
body:
# NovaMTR Modpack

This is the official NovaMTR modpack, for use in NovaMTR.

<details>
<summary>What is NovaMTR?</summary>
Nova MTR is a server that is meant to train builders of all skill levels to become great, by providing a large canvas for creativity. Based off a few key components, we hope to build a giant, loving, productive, and creative community. Dedicated to building a large and incredibly made network.

## What are the key parts of Nova MTR? ##

**1. NO WORLD RESETS**
Our world will be an ever evolving history. We need to embrace it and never let it go. Only in the exception of a cataclysmic event, server killing lag, or an overwhelming vote among builders and admins. This world will continue to live, breathe, and evolve. For as long as possible.

**2. BUILDER TRAINING AND EXTRA ROLES**
Many aspiring builders may not meet the quality standards of the server. To solve this issue, instead of a flat Yes/No for building. Applicants with potential will be trained and given roles and building capabilities in public events, and even given the ability to collaborate with builders. Builders themselves are also encouraged to build on stream and voice chat. Demonstrating their techniques and skills to trainee builders, and allowing them to develop and learn, with real connection with talented creators.

**3. PUBLIC EVENTS**
Community building is something lacking from most MTR servers, everyone goes off to do their own thing. Making friendships and finding community is unnecessarily difficult, especially for new players. To fix this, Nova MTR will have multiple PUBLIC EVENTS running at scheduled times at least once a week, These include: City Building Crunch sessions, Station Collab Clashes, Station Speed-build contests, AND MORE.
These events will also give Trainee builders a small chance to showcase their growth, as they will be given temporary build perms upon entering these events.

**WE NEED** ***YOU*** Everyone, regardless of experience and talent is welcome to come, explore, and apply here. Join via our discord link in the sidebar.

</details>



## Terms of Use

### You may:

- Add optimisation mods to the modpack.
- Add resource packs to the modpack after suggesting it in #mod-suggestions.

### You MUST NOT:

- Re-release this modpack.
- Use this modpack for other use, for example, as a modpack for another Minecraft server.
- Export private resource packs found in this modpack.

## Disclaimer

- All resource packs in this mod pack have been granted permission to be in, with most of them being made by builders of this server, for this server ONLY.
